title: Give access to Folder which gives access to all Boards/Documents in folder
excerpt:
Would it be possible to get an option to add a team or team members to a folder? 
Then they would have access to all the boards or documents in the project folder except for any private docs or private boards? Would help…

posts.author: jon1 (Jonathan Hurr)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would it be possible to get an option to add a team or team members to a folder?
Then they would have access to all the boards or documents in the project folder except for any private docs or private boards? Would help limit the need to add each person or team to every board or doc in a project folder.

Thank You!
Jon
